name: Chicken Okra Gumbo with Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chicken pieces in some of the oil; remove from pot.
2. Brown okra and remove from pot.
3. Add remaining oil and flour, stirring constantly until roux is a rich brown color.
4. Add okra and water to roux, blending well.
5. Add chicken, sausage, gizzards, and remaining ingredients except file'. Salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cook for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
7. Stir in file' during the last half hour of cooking.
8. Serve with hot cooked rice in soup bowls.
